text: I sense an atmosphere of experimentation and reflection here—the purple glow in the first room feels both futuristic and oddly vacant, like awaiting an idea to fill its emptiness. In the second space, the words on the wall and screen energize me with a sense of purposeful curiosity, of being surrounded by intentions and dreams for a better world. Yet, I also notice a kind of clinical distance, a coolness that makes me wonder: am I a participant or just an observer in the slow unfolding of innovation?
